popularStory.headline: John Washburn Family Second Generation: The Plymouth Colony Pages
popularStory.description:
John Washburn Family
Second Generation

2 John2 Washburn (John1) baptized 26-Nov-1620 Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England [MFIPCooke 9]; died 12-Nov-1686 Bridgewater [MD 15:251]. 

He married 1st 06-D …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Washburn Jr.於1620年11月26日之前出生在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，他的父親John Washborn Sr23歲，母親Margaret Moore34歲。他於1645年12月6日與Elizabeth Mitchell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利且在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特住了大約13年。他去世於1686年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Washburn Jr.于1620年11月26日之前出生在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯时，他的父亲John Washborn Sr23岁，母亲Margaret Moore34岁。他于1645年12月6日与Elizabeth Mitchell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利且在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布利其沃特住了大约13年。他去世于1686年11月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯布利其沃特。

nameMeanings.name: Washburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Washburn Jr. was born before 26 November 1620, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Washborn Sr, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Moore, was 34. He married Elizabeth Mitchell on 6 December 1645, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1635 and Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America for about 13 years. He died on 12 November 1686, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Washburn Jr. est né avant 26 novembre 1620, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Washborn Sr, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moore, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mitchell le 6 décembre 1645, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635 et à Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 13 ans. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1686, à Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Washburn Jr. vor 26. November 1620 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Washborn Sr 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Moore 34. Er hat am 6. Dezember 1645 in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Mitchell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1635 hat er in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt, und ungefähr 13 Jahre lang hat er in Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 12. November 1686 in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Washburn Jr. è nato il prima del 26 novembre 1620 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Washborn Sr, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Moore, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mitchell il 6 dicembre 1645, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635 e nel Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America per circa 13 anni. Morì il 12 novembre 1686, nel Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Washburn Jr.が1620年11月26日以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた時，父John Washborn Srは23歳，母Margaret Mooreは34歳であった。1645年12月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーでElizabeth Mitchellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーダクスブリーに，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリジェワターに約13年間住んでいた。彼は1686年11月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスブリジェワターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Washburn Jr.(이)가 1620년 11월 26일 이전 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Washborn Sr(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moore(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1645년 12월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 Elizabeth Mitchell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1635년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이에서, 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리지왓어에서 약 13년 동안 살았다. 그는 1686년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Washburn Jr. nasceu antes 26 de novembro de 1620, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Washborn Sr, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moore, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mitchell em 6 de dezembro de 1645, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1635 e em Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America por quase 13 anos. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1686, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Washburn Jr. родился перед 26 ноябрь 1620 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Washborn Sr было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moore, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mitchell 6 декабря 1645 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности дуксбури, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году и в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика около 13 лет. Он умер 12 ноября 1686 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Washburn Jr. nació antes de 26 de noviembre de 1620, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Washborn Sr, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Moore, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mitchell el 6 de diciembre de 1645, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1635 y en Bridgewater, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 13 años. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1686, en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
